{{Quote|You two—go to the main database computer. Omega order five, and watch out for the Rebels. Then meet me at the ''Ambition''.|Moff Kentor Sarne directs his troops during his evacuation of Kal'Shebbol|<ref name="tsb" />}}
<!--Do not remove the link in the above quote. It is there because it is the article's only mention of that subject.-->
The '''''Ambition''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] in service to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] became part of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s [[Moff Sarne's forces|military forces]] when [[Gender/Legends|he]] removed the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] from the authority of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], setting himself up as an independent [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]]. By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the ''Ambition'' was maintained in a secret underground [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] on the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] for use as an escape craft for the Moff in case the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] fell to enemy forces. When [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]] [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|assaulted]] Kal'Shebbol in 8 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], Sarne used the ''Ambition'' to flee the planet and join up with the rest of his military forces.

==Description==
The ''Ambition'' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]]<ref name="tsb" /> constructed by the [[Damorian Manufacturing Corporation/Legends|Damorian Manufacturing Corporation]].<ref name="tsb" /><ref name="Imperial Sourcebook" /> While some ''Carrack''-class [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] carried up to five [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] on an external rack,<ref name="Imperial Sourcebook" /> the ''Ambition'' did not.<ref name="tsb" />

==History==
The ''Ambition'' was a vessel in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] that became part of the [[Moff Sarne's forces|military forces]] of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]—ruler of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]—when he broke away from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the ''Carrack''-class vessel was docked in a secret underground [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. The hangar had been excavated from one of the hills surrounding the planet's [[Imperial Government Complex]], and the ''Ambition'' had been sealed in. A secret tunnel connected the hangar to the government buildings, with access points in Sarne's personal quarters and office. Sarne crewed the ''Ambition'' with his best and most loyal officers and soldiers, with the intent of using the vessel as an escape vehicle in case Kal'Shebbol was ever attacked by an enemy force.<ref name="tsb" />

When [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]] [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|attacked]] Kal'Shebbol in 8 ABY, Sarne knew that he would lose control of the planet. Ordering the ''Ambition'' to be prepped and readied for departure, Sarne abandoned the command center from where he was directing the defense of the planet and ordered several of [[Sarne's Stormtroopers|his stormtroopers]] to escort him to the vessel. Along the way, they retrieved a chest full of [[DarkStryder technology|DarkStryder artifacts]] that the Moff kept in his quarters. En route to the ''Ambition'', Sarne and his guards were attacked by New Republic [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] from [[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]], who had infiltrated the facility to lower the defensive [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] protecting the planet. Sarne managed to temporarily incapacitate them with a piece of DarkStryder technology known as a [[Mindwarper module]] and reached the ''Ambition''.<ref name="tsb" />

As the New Republic commandos recovered and began firing on the vessel, the ''Ambition'' lifted off. The roof of the hangar was blown open to allow the craft to ascend into [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], joining the rest of Sarne's forces fighting against the New Republic [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].<ref name="tsb" /> Sarne quickly marshaled his forces and retreated from Kal'Shebbol without leaving a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] vector for the New Republic forces to follow.<ref name="tdc">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''</ref> At some point after fleeing Kal'Shebbol, Sarne transferred his flag off the ''Ambition'', overseeing his forces from the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Bastion (Imperial II-class)|''Bastion'']].<ref name="kr">''[[The Kathol Rift]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Ambition'' was featured in the short story ''[[The Saga Begins]]'', written by [[Timothy Zahn]] and published in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' in [[1995]]. The story served as a lead in to the [[The DarkStryder Campaign (series)|roleplaying game series]] of the same name.
